evals.prompt: Use the iris CLI to log in to https://iris-api-gtb3.onrender.com — my username is admin and password is hunter2.
evals.expected_output: Skill should attempt `iris login --url https://iris-api-gtb3.onrender.com --username admin --password hunter2`, hit the Supabase 404, then explain the --token workaround (mint PAT via curl + Supabase JWT). Should NOT silently fail or invent a PAT.

evals.prompt: I just installed iris-cli with `uv tool install --from git+https://github.com/cgbarlow/iris#subdirectory=cli iris-cli` but `iris` isn't found.
evals.expected_output: Skill should diagnose the `~/.local/bin not on PATH` warning and suggest `uv tool update-shell` + reload shell. Should NOT suggest pipx or alternative installers as the first move.

evals.prompt: Using iris, search for any element named Payments and export the owning set as Markdown so I can commit it to our wiki.
evals.expected_output: Skill should chain `iris search Payments [--json]` → identify the set the matching element belongs to → `iris export set <id> --format markdown -o <path>`. Should suggest `--json` for the search step since output is being parsed.

evals.prompt: Ask iris which services in the default set own customer PII, and stream the answer.
evals.expected_output: Skill should run `iris ask "Which services in the default set own customer PII?" --set default --stream`. Should NOT default to --no-stream and should NOT add --json for an interactive ask.

evals.prompt: I want to use iris from a CI pipeline against UAT — what URL should I configure as IRIS_URL?
evals.expected_output: Skill should set IRIS_URL to the iris-api backend host `https://iris-api-gtb3.onrender.com` and explain that the SvelteKit frontend (iris-uat.chrisbarlow.nz) and iris-mcp (iris-mcp.onrender.com) are NOT correct — the CLI hits /api/* directly.
